hbo-plasma-1500.title: HBOT increases plasma-dissolved oxygen
hbo-plasma-1500.phrasing_en: At 2.4 ATA breathing 100% oxygen, plasma-dissolved oxygen rises ~17-fold over normal air; at 1.3 ATA breathing ambient air the rise is ~1.4-fold.
hbo-plasma-1500.what_it_does_not_show: Plasma O₂ increase does not by itself imply clinical benefit at any pressure.

hbo-cd34-thom-2006.title: Stem cell mobilization (CD34+) ~8-fold after 20 sessions at 2.0 ATA
hbo-cd34-thom-2006.phrasing_en: Adults completing 20 sessions of HBOT at 2.0 ATA showed an ~8× increase in circulating CD34+ stem cells (Thom 2006).
hbo-cd34-thom-2006.what_it_does_not_show: The study used 2.0 ATA hard chambers; effects at 1.3 ATA mild chambers are not established.

source.journal: Am J Physiol Heart Circ Physiol

long-covid-zilberman-2022.title: HBOT improves cognitive and physical symptoms in post-COVID-19 condition
long-covid-zilberman-2022.phrasing_en: In a sham-controlled RCT, 40 sessions at 2.0 ATA improved cognition, fatigue, and quality of life vs. sham (Zilberman-Itskovich 2022).
long-covid-zilberman-2022.what_it_does_not_show: Pressure was 2.0 ATA — efficacy at 1.3 ATA mild chambers is not established. Symptoms returned partially in some participants over follow-up.
